  • Method
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Interface KeYParserVisitor<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
    All Superinterfaces:
    org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ChoiceFinder, ContractsAndInvariantsFinder, DeclarationBuilder, DefaultBuilder, ExpressionBuilder, FindProblemInformation, FunctionPredicateBuilder, IncludeFinder, KeYParserBaseVisitor, ProblemFinder, TacletPBuilder

    public interface KeYParserVisitor<T>
extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
    This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by KeYParser.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
